subject: Quick question on the Q2 roadmap doc
body:
Hey Kyle,

I was reviewing the Q2 roadmap you shared and had one question — the 'onboarding overhaul' line item doesn't have an owner listed. Is that still you, or did we move it to Priya's team?

Trying to finalize staffing today if possible.

Thanks,
Sarah
label: needs_reply
notes: Specific question from coworker with a same-day deadline — clear reply needed.

subject: Your receipt from Stripe, Inc. #2847-1X
body:
Thanks for your payment!

Amount: $29.00
Description: Monthly subscription
Card: Visa ending 4242

View receipt: https://dashboard.stripe.com/receipts/...
label: fyi
notes: Automated receipt — worth keeping for records, no action needed.

subject: The one about the $10B pickle startup
body:
Good morning!

Today in 5 minutes: A pickle startup raised $10B, Tesla did a thing, and why everyone's suddenly buying kazoos.

[Read more...]

Unsubscribe | Manage preferences
label: newsletter
notes: Classic newsletter — recurring content blast, unsubscribe link in footer.

subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You have won $4,500,000 USD!!
body:
Dear Lucky Winner,

We are pleased to inform you that your email has been selected in our international lottery draw. To claim your prize of $4,500,000 USD, please reply with your full name, address, phone number, and bank details.

Urgent response required within 48 hours.

Regards,
Dr. Michael Okafor
Prize Committee
label: trash
notes: Obvious scam — nigerian-prince-style lottery fraud.

subject: Final round interview scheduling — LumenAI PM role
body:
Hi Kyle,

Congrats again on making it to the final round. We'd love to get you in front of the exec team this week — does Thursday 2pm or Friday 10am work better?

The loop will be 4 hours total: product case study, two panel interviews, and a casual chat with our CEO Jen. I'll send the prep materials once we lock the slot.

Excited to host you,
David
label: urgent
notes: Job interview scheduling — time-sensitive and high-stakes for an active job search.

subject: Dinner Sunday?
body:
Hi sweetheart,

Dad and I were thinking you could come over for dinner Sunday evening — maybe 6ish? I'm making the lasagna you like. Let me know.

Love you,
Mom
label: needs_reply
notes: Personal message that wants a yes/no reply soon.

subject: [kyle/sift] PR #12: Fix classifier prompt regression
body:
PR #12 by kyle was merged.

Changes:
- Updated classify.md prompt to include few-shot examples
- Bumped eval threshold to 0.85

5 files changed, 112 insertions, 47 deletions.
label: fyi
notes: GitHub notification — informational, no action.

subject: 50% off your next order — today only!
body:
Kyle, we miss you! Here's 50% off your next order up to $15. Use code TREATYOURSELF at checkout. Expires midnight tonight.

Order now [link]
label: trash
notes: Promotional spam — low-value marketing blast.

subject: Senior AI PM role at a Series C startup — quick chat?
body:
Hi Kyle,

I came across your profile and I'm reaching out about a Senior AI PM role at a Series C startup in the developer-tools space. They're looking for someone who can ship AI-native features and works closely with eng.

Comp is in the $220-260k base range plus equity. Fully remote.

Would you have 15 min this week for a quick intro call?

Best,
Priya
label: needs_reply
notes: Cold recruiter outreach with a concrete role and comp range. Worth a reply given active job search.

subject: 💎 The best PM interview questions I've ever been asked
body:
Hi friends,

This week: a deep dive into the 12 PM interview questions that actually separate great candidates from good ones, based on conversations with 40+ hiring managers.

Read the full post [link]

- Lenny
label: newsletter
notes: Substack newsletter — recurring content, not time-sensitive.

subject: Your payment to AMEX is due in 2 days
body:
Hi Kyle,

This is a reminder that your scheduled payment of $1,247.13 to American Express is due on 2026-04-22.

If the auto-pay is set up correctly, no action is needed.

— Chase Bank
label: urgent
notes: Bill-pay reminder with a 2-day deadline — financially material.

subject: coffee this month??
body:
hey stranger!!

it's been forever. i'm in town for a couple weeks and would love to catch up. any chance you're free for coffee sometime in the next 2 weeks? i know things have been hectic with the job search.

lmk what works 🙏

— jamie
label: needs_reply
notes: Personal catch-up request from a friend, wants a time.

subject: You have 8 new connection requests
body:
Hi Kyle,

You have 8 new connection requests and 14 profile views this week. See who's interested in connecting.

[View on LinkedIn]
label: newsletter
notes: LinkedIn engagement-bait digest — recurring, low-priority.

subject: Security alert: new sign-in on Windows
body:
A new device signed in to your Google Account.

Device: Windows PC
Location: Seattle, WA
Time: April 20, 2026 at 7:20 AM PDT

If this was you, no action needed. If you don't recognize this activity, check your account.
label: fyi
notes: Legitimate security notification for user's own sign-in. No action needed assuming it's them.

subject: 🐶 Lost dog in Greenwood, and 4 other updates from your neighbors
body:
Here's what's happening near you this week on Nextdoor:

- Lost dog in Greenwood
- Recommendation request: plumber
- Community yard sale Saturday

[Open Nextdoor]
label: newsletter
notes: Aggregated community digest.

subject: Re: Thanks for the referral — quick update
body:
Kyle,

Just wanted to close the loop: the intro you made to Sarah at Figma landed us a call next week. Appreciate it more than you know. Drinks on me next time you're in SF.

— Alex
label: fyi
notes: A thank-you with no ask. Nice to read but no reply strictly required.

subject: Action Required: Unclaimed property $3,240.88 awaits release
body:
Dear KYLE RAUCH,

Our records indicate unclaimed property in your name totaling $3,240.88. To release these funds to your bank account, verify your identity at the link below within 72 hours or the claim will be forfeited.

[Verify Now]

Treasury Claims Department
label: trash
notes: Phishing attempt dressed up as a government claim. .gov.co is not a legitimate US domain.

subject: Water shutoff tomorrow 9am-1pm
body:
Hi Kyle,

Just a heads up that the building will have a water shutoff tomorrow (Monday, April 20) from 9am to 1pm for pipe maintenance. Please plan accordingly.

Thanks,
Maria
label: fyi
notes: Building notice; already accounted for.

subject: Looking forward to our chat
body:
Hi Kyle,

David passed along your background and I'm really looking forward to our conversation as part of your loop. I read your essay on AI-native product design — the part about "evals as the new unit tests" especially landed.

If you have any questions before we meet, just drop me a line.

Best,
Jen
label: needs_reply
notes: Personal note from CEO of a company interviewing him. A reply is expected, even a brief one.

subject: 🔥 Today's top launches: AI meeting notes, a better Notion, and more
body:
Today on Product Hunt:

1. MeetScribe — AI meeting notes that actually remember
2. Noted — a cleaner Notion
3. FlowTime — focus timer for ADHD brains

[See all]
label: newsletter
notes: Standard product-launch newsletter.

subject: Re: Issue #4821: Exporting reports to CSV
body:
Hi Kyle,

Thanks for flagging this. We've identified the bug and have a fix scheduled for our next release (April 23). I'll follow up once it's deployed.

No action needed on your end in the meantime.

— CoolSaaS Support
label: fyi
notes: Support update — informational.

subject: Following up on our conversation
body:
Hi Kyle,

Following up from our call on Wednesday. The team discussed your background and we'd love to move forward with a take-home case study. I've attached the brief. Please submit by EOD Friday, April 24.

Let me know if you have any questions,
Carol
label: urgent
notes: Interview take-home with a hard deadline — high-priority in an active job search.

subject: you hear about mark??
body:
dude. mark is moving to japan. like next month. kind of a lot to process. lmk if you wanna hop on a call this week — feels like we should do something for him before he goes.

— pete
label: needs_reply
notes: Close friend, emotionally weighted, asking for a call.

This is to confirm that your 2025 federal tax return has been received and accepted by the IRS. You may track your refund status at irs.gov/refunds.

body:
Hi Kyle,

This is a reminder that your COBRA election deadline is May 1, 2026. If you wish to continue health coverage, please complete the enrollment form attached and return it by that date.

Missing the deadline means losing the option permanently.

— Benefits

notes: Healthcare election with a hard deadline and no-going-back consequences.

subject: Can you review my essay draft by Thursday?
body:
Hey Kyle,

No pressure, but would you be up for giving my essay draft another round of edits by Thursday? It's the one on AI and product management we discussed at the writing group. ~1,800 words. Attached.

Happy to return the favor — I think you said you had a piece cooking too.

Thanks!
Jordan
label: needs_reply
notes: Specific ask with a soft deadline, low-stakes but polite reply expected.

Hot deals in Seattle:

- 70% off couples massage at Tranquil Spa

[See all deals]

notes: Deal-site promo spam.

subject: Re: Career advice
body:
Kyle,

Good seeing you last week. I was thinking more about your question on whether to optimize for a PM role vs. an AI eng role, and I landed on this: if you can pick the company first, the role matters much less. Go where the work is most interesting and the people are the best, and the title will sort itself out.

Let me know if you want to grab coffee again in a few weeks.

— Bob
label: needs_reply
notes: Thoughtful advice from a mentor; polite reply expected, no hard deadline.

subject: Appointment reminder: Thursday 4:30pm with Dr. Abbas
body:
Reminder: You have an appointment on Thursday, April 23 at 4:30 PM with Dr. Abbas.

Location: 1234 Main St, Suite 200, Seattle, WA

Reply C to confirm, R to reschedule.
label: fyi
notes: Automated appointment reminder; only needs reply if rescheduling.

Something came up with the Acme account. Can you block 20 minutes sometime today? Ideally before 3pm.

subject: Confidential business proposal — urgent
body:
Dearest friend,

I hope this message finds you in good health. I am reaching out in confidence regarding a matter of great financial opportunity. I require a trusted foreign partner to facilitate the transfer of $24,500,000 USD from my late father's estate. Your share will be 30%.

Please reply with your full name, address, and bank details to proceed.

Yours faithfully,
Prince Al-Hassan
label: trash
notes: Textbook 419 scam.

subject: Interested in publishing your essay?
body:
Hi Kyle,

I came across your 'Evals as the New Unit Tests' piece and loved it. I edit Threadleaf, a small publication covering thoughtful takes on tech. Would you be open to us republishing it (with attribution + link back)? Happy to discuss a modest honorarium.

If yes, I'll send our standard terms.

Best,
Samira
label: needs_reply
notes: Interesting publishing opportunity, wants a yes/no and terms.

subject: Your meeting recording is ready
body:
Your recording of 'Weekly 1:1 — Kyle & Sarah' is ready to view.

Duration: 32 min
Transcript included

[View recording]
label: fyi
notes: Recording availability notification.

subject: BOOST YOUR CLICKS BY 400% WITH THIS ONE WEIRD TRICK
body:
Are YOU tired of your marketing campaigns underperforming???

Our proprietary AI-DRIVEN FUNNEL HACKING SYSTEM has helped thousands of entrepreneurs 10x their revenue in just 30 days!!!

Click here for a FREE webinar — today only!!!

[REGISTER NOW]
label: trash
notes: Marketing clickbait / MLM vibes.

subject: Intro to a founder you should meet
body:
Hi Kyle —

I was catching up with Omar Haddad (founder of Arclight, we backed their seed) and he's looking for a founding PM. Smart guy, clear thinker, good technical co-founder. I think you two should talk.

Introducing —

Omar — Kyle was most recently at [previous co] and is thinking about his next move. Kyle — Omar is building Arclight, an AI ops platform for mid-market companies, raised $3.5M seed from us last fall.

I'll leave you two to it.

— Rhea
label: needs_reply
notes: Warm VC intro — needs a prompt, well-written reply to the founder.
